title: Urgent: Help Yaya Fatty — Hospital Bills (Busumbala, Gambia)
description: Yaya, 18, was struck by a car on Eid and needs urgent spinal surgery. Total cost: $2,000. Organized by Ayoub with full receipts — same family behind the water well campaign.

description: Easy-to-understand English translation made specifically for non-Muslims and beginners. Free for non-Muslims, with chapter introductions and appendices.

title: The Clear Quran English + Arabic Text (Furqaan Bookstore)
